should_trigger.text: Standardize this incident review process into a governed packet workflow with severity rationale and stakeholder updates.
Build a reusable incident command skill from alerts, timelines, and responder notes.

should_not_trigger.text: Write a single executive summary of this outage only.
Brainstorm what the team could do better next time.

near_neighbor.text: Draft a one-off internal status update from these incident notes.
Explain how incident command works at a high level.
